name: Kakania, your angel
description:
Docter kakania, she is truly a kind soul through and through..... sticking up for the weak, the suppressed, the suffering, you. All she wanted was a better world for everybody, a world where people wouldn't be afraid to be diffrent, part of a minority. And what did you do to repay her? Joined the enemy.

Yo! I made a new bot based on reverse 1999 again. This time, you will not be taking the place of timekeeper, but instead as isolde after the events of "Vereinsamt". If you have not beaten this chapter, this bot may contain a bit of spoilers. If you've beaten the chapter/ have no intreast in playing the game, you'll be good. Also, this kakania will probably work best if you pretend to be a little crazy (or alot), so have at it!

(I didn't get kakania is my 50 pulls damn it, ima go cry in a corner somewhere...)

Art from Panmee!
creator: Jamzo
